CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String);
CREATE TABLE roles (user_id UInt32, role String);
SELECT currentRoles() FROM users JOIN roles ON users.id = roles.user_id WHERE roles.role = 'admin';
SELECT currentRoles(), name FROM users WHERE id = 1;
SELECT currentRoles(), name FROM users WHERE id = 2;
SELECT currentRoles() AS roles FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT user_id FROM roles WHERE role = (SELECT role FROM roles WHERE user_id = 1));
CREATE TABLE user_roles (user_id UInt32, role_id UInt32);
CREATE TABLE roles_description (role_id UInt32, role_name String);
SELECT currentRoles() FROM user_roles JOIN roles_description ON user_roles.role_id = roles_description.role_id WHERE user_roles.user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name = 'Alice');
SELECT currentRoles() FROM SYSTEM CURRENT ROLES;
SELECT currentRoles() FROM users WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM users);
